steps.title: Read the underlined comment
steps.content: The underlined portion says Duarte and colleagues were capitalizing on the research potential of historical DNA from a vast but underused source. That language evaluates the importance of their approach.

steps.title: Reject function mismatches
steps.content: Choice A says the portion lists applications, but no applications are specified. Choice C shifts to the importance of findings, though the passage discusses method. Choice D says it explains why the method is underused, but no cause is given.

steps.title: Name the evaluative role
steps.content: The remaining choice correctly describes the underlined portion as commentary on why Duarte and colleagues' approach is significant. The answer is B.
